article_title: 给 AI 编码代理接上 Microsoft Learn：用 Learn MCP Server 拿到当下的官方文档
core_theme: Microsoft Learn MCP Server 让 AI 编码代理在写代码前先查当下的官方文档，从而避开训练截止日期带来的过期 API 问题。
reader_takeaway: 读者知道 Learn MCP Server 是什么、为什么有用、在 GitHub Copilot CLI 和 VS Code 里如何接入，并理解“接入文档”和“不接入文档”的真实差距。
summary_angle: 一个有无对照：同样的 prompt，没有 Learn MCP 时陷入 15 次工具调用调依赖；接上 Learn MCP 后 0 步调试、直接产出可运行的部署脚本。

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文对比表第一行：Agent's first action — Web search vs Microsoft Docs Search
information_blocks.visual_idea: 封面左半边一个代理形象在迷雾中翻找旧手册；右半边代理通过细线连接到 Learn 文档块，画面更通透

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文表格：Debug steps before producing code — 15+ tool calls vs 0
information_blocks.visual_idea: 左半边漂浮 15 个杂乱的小工具齿轮，右半边只有一个干净的 0 数字 chip

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文：Learn MCP Server gives agents direct access to Microsoft Learn documentation … through MCP
information_blocks.visual_idea: 中间一根细线连接代理与一本带 Learn 标识的开放文档，象征 MCP 信道

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文：az ml (deprecated) vs az cognitiveservices (current)
information_blocks.visual_idea: 右半边代理手里握着一份印有“az cognitiveservices”小标签的清晰脚本

main_metaphor: 代理从盲翻旧手册到看清官方文档的双联画对比
primary_subject: 一个抽象的 AI 编码代理角色，在画面中央被一条细线穿过左右两个状态
subject_action: 左侧代理低头在杂乱齿轮中翻找；右侧代理抬头看向开放的 Learn 文档并写出干净的脚本
composition: 左右对照双联式构图，中央留出一条贯穿的细线代表 MCP 信道
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: minimalist line-art illustration, sparse clean strokes, ample negative space, precise symbolic objects, limited accent color
selected_style_reason: 随机选择；极简线稿风的留白与细线天然契合“信道连接”和“前后对照”叙事，不容易掉进伪 UI、霓虹科技的窠臼
style_safety_note: 风格名为通用艺术类别，未指向具体品牌、工作室或在世艺术家，无需改写
avoid: Microsoft 真实 logo 或商标
真实 Azure 门户截图或假 dashboard
霓虹紫蓝赛博朋克氛围
英文长口号或封面主标题
reference_strategy: 纯文本生成；无可复用本地素材
draft_goal: 验证左右对照构图能否在一张 2.35:1 宽图里清晰承载“无文档 / 接入 Learn”的两个状态，并让中央细线读得出 MCP 信道含义
revision_targets: 如果左右两侧失去对照关系，强化中央分界与细线
如果出现伪 UI 或假 logo，明确禁用并改用纯符号文档
如果可见文字超过 4 处或出现英文长句，收紧标签到允许清单
final_prompt: wide cover illustration, aspect ratio 2.35:1, product-poster style illustration combined with minimalist line-art illustration, sparse clean strokes, ample negative space, precise symbolic objects, limited accent color. Diptych-style before-and-after composition for a tech article cover. Left half: a faceless AI coding agent figure crouched and rummaging through a cluttered pile of small mechanical gears and faded paper manuals in dim flat lighting, conveying confusion. Right half: the same agent figure standing upright, calmly looking toward an open, clean book labeled with a small neutral docs glyph, holding a tidy floating script panel; one thin horizontal line crosses the entire canvas through the agent in both halves, suggesting an MCP channel connecting the two states. Off-white background, deep ink black linework, a single muted teal accent on the connecting line, the open book, and the script panel. Include only four small Chinese chip labels positioned beside the relevant objects: 首步：搜文档 above the right book, 调试步骤 15→0 between the two halves, Learn MCP on the connecting line near the center, 当下 API near the script panel; no other text anywhere. Strict prohibitions: no real Microsoft logo, no real Azure portal screenshots, no fake dashboards, no fake terminal output, no fake architecture node names, no fabricated metrics beyond the 15→0 chip, no English slogans, no poster title, no watermark, no neon cyberpunk lighting, no generic robot stance, no floating code rain, no dense HUD overlays.
